expectations.text: Recommends az acr import to pull the image into ACR
expectations.evidence: Step 1 shows 'az acr import --name cafehyna --source docker.io/library/nginx:1.25 --image nginx:1.25'

expectations.text: Shows the correct az acr import command with --source docker.io/nginx:1.25
Updates the Dockerfile FROM to reference cafehyna.azurecr.io instead of Docker Hub
Explains that ACR cloud builds are unauthenticated against Docker Hub
expectations.evidence: 'ACR build agents are unauthenticated against Docker Hub, they hit the anonymous pull rate limit'

expectations.text: Includes a rebuild command using az acr build
